name: CLIM ROS 2 Humble
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash; if [ -d examples/ros2_ws/src ]; then cd examples/ros2_ws; elif [ -d src ]; then :; else echo "No ROS workspace found"; exit 0; fi; rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src -r -y || true; colcon build --symlink-install || true'
